author: Professor Lee
text: Any questions about the final project requirements?

author: Alice
text: Can we work in groups or must it be individual?

author: Professor Lee
text: Groups of up to 3 are allowed. Just make sure everyone contributes.

author: Bob
text: What's the submission format? Code only or with documentation?

author: Professor Lee
text: Please include a README and comments in your code.

author: Carol
text: Is there a penalty for late submission?

author: Professor Lee
text: Yes, 10% deduction per day late. No submissions accepted after 3 days.

author: Dan
text: Can we use external libraries like TensorFlow?

author: Professor Lee
text: Yes, external libraries are encouraged. Just document your dependencies.
